=======================================
INSTRUCTIONS FOR MANUAL VERIFICATION:
1. Visit the contract address page on https://explorer.iopn.tech/
2. Go to the "Code" or "Contract" tab and click "Verify & Publish".
3. Select "Solidity (Single File)" as the compiler type.
4. Select compiler version "v0.8.35+commit.47b9dedd" (or custom equivalent).
5. Set "Optimization" to Yes/True and input 200 runs.
6. Copy and paste the entire Solidity file contents from the 'verification_helper' folder:
   - For NBLAD / DE4I / GIOPN, paste content of 'TestERC20_flattened.sol'.
   - For DEX, paste content of 'myIOPN_DEX_flattened.sol'.
7. In the "Constructor Arguments" field, copy and paste the corresponding "without 0x" hex string from this file.
8. Click "Verify and Publish"!
